subcodes.first_line: O thou whose countenance is luminous! In the Arabic tongue, "abhar" signifieth "more radiant". It is hoped that, through the confirmation of the peerless Lord, thou wilt prove to be even so [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای روی تو باهر ابهر در لغت عرب بمعنی روشنتر است امید از تایید رب وحید چنانست
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @light and darkness
